subject: english
topic_title: Verb Forms: Past and Past Participle
learning_objectives: Identify past and past participle forms of irregular verbs

sections.heading: Irregular Verb Forms
sections.content:
List of verbs with past and past participle forms:
awake - awoke - awoken
beat - beat - beaten
cling - clung - clung
drink - drank - drunk
feel - felt - felt
find - found - found
forget - forgot - forgotten
freeze - froze - frozen
grind - ground - ground
hide - hid - hidden
hold - held - held
leave - left - left
shut - shut - shut
sow - sowed - sown
stand - stood - stood
sweep - swept - swept
swell - swelled - swollen
swing - swung - swung
take - took - taken
wring - wrung - wrung

sections.heading: Usage in Sentences
sections.content: 1. The child had drunk the entire bottle before I came in. 2. After I told Kola of the accident, he began to cry. 3. When prices fall consumers feel happy. 4. The wind has blown away my shirt.
